text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While conducting a dance lesson with Mejiro
Dober...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Sorry, can you stop the music?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Do you even have to ask? I'm not doing it right at
all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I don't know why, but I can't seem to dance the
way I want to.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I want to repay all the fans supporting me, but
there's no way I can do that with this lackluster
dance...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I want to repay all the fans supporting me, but
there's no way I can do that with this lackluster
dance...
Don't sell yourself short!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Wha? P-Pearl?!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Fear not! I'm here to blow away those itty-bitty
worries of yours!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Well, let's get dancing!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Wait... You mean, you're going to dance too?!
I-I...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Of course I am! C'mon!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
U-um... Your dancing is so bold and gorgeous,
and dazzling!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: But those are all qualities I lack...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I can't ever seem to get things right when I
dance... It doesn't feel like I can convey anything
with my dancing.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: That may be true... but it may also not be true.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Our performances ride the airwaves from living
rooms here in Japan, to the other side of the
world... and all the way to outer space!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: With so many people watching us, there's no way none of them feel anything from our concerts.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Just like how you said my dancing is perfect,
someone out there might be saying the same
thing about yours.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
The possibilities are endless! You have to be more
optimistic!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: More optimistic? ...You think even my dancing could be perfect to someone out there?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Okay, Pearl. I'll keep trying.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps it's because she finally starts believing in
her own potential, but Mejiro Dober's dancing
becomes sharper than before.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I really appreciate your help today. I don't know
how to thank you.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
You don't have to do that. Though, if you want to
thank someone, thank the people you want to
express your feelings to.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: But... there are so many of them.
choice_data_list: Then start with the people around you.
You could stream yourself to the world.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: The people around me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
J-just so you know, that category doesn't include
you at all!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Then I guess I have to start with the person
closest to me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm going to keep practicing!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm going to keep practicing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober continues with her dance lesson,
and...

text_block_list.name: Younger Students
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Dober's dancing! She looks so dignified and
powerful... and sooo cool!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She polishes her dancing into something that can
convey her feelings to others.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You mean... I should make my dancing famous
around the world?

text_block_list.name: International Fans
text_block_list.text: Ahhhh! Dober! Look over here! Dance for us!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: A-as if! There's no way I can do that!
choice_data_list: You'll just have to practice more, then.
You'll just have to practice more, then.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's far too embarrassing. There's no way I
can do that...
choice_data_list: You'll just have to practice more, then.
You'll just have to practice more, then.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
That's not what I mean! I'm talking about the
mental hurdle here!
choice_data_list:
Okay, then we'll just have to strengthen you
mentally too!

Okay, then we'll just have to strengthen you
mentally too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Um... I'm glad you're so confident in my skills, but
the mental hurdle is more of the problem here...
choice_data_list:
Okay, then we'll just have to strengthen you
mentally too!

Okay, then we'll just have to strengthen you
mentally too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... How do I get through to you? What I'm
trying to say is...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: That's not what I... Wait... Maybe it is?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Losing to my persistence, Mejiro Dober continues
with her lesson and improves the precision of her
dancing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Losing to my persistence, Mejiro Dober continues
with her lesson and improves the precision of her
dancing.
